response.justification: Strong technical alignment with 14+ years of full-stack experience exceeding the 6-year requirement. Candidate demonstrates mastery of the primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and explicitly mentions AI agent and MCP infrastructure work—a specific required skill. Gaps in explicit Nest.js and testing framework details are minor given the senior background; these are easily addressable. Currently at Staff level, which may indicate overqualification, but the proven IC contributions and engineering excellence make this a compelling profile.
strengths: Extensive full-stack expertise with exact match on primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) proven across multiple production roles
Direct AI agent development and MCP infrastructure experience at re:cinq, addressing a specific required skill
Strong engineering practices (TDD, pair programming, trunk-based development) and demonstrated ability to mentor through workshops and teaching
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, a primary stack requirement, though TypeScript/Node seniority suggests rapid ramp-up
Testing framework expertise (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly detailed despite clear TDD commitment
Currently a Staff Engineer at re:cinq; may be overqualified or seeking broader architectural scope than typical senior IC responsibilities

key_factors.factor: Primary tech stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience
